name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == 
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
    /\ turn \in 1..N

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "idle"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
        /\ turn' = (turn % N) + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
    /\ turn \in 1..N

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, state, messages



TypeOK ==
  /\ participants \subseteq 1..N
  /\ coordinator \in 1..N
  /\ state \in [1..N -> {"INIT", "PREPARED", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}]
  /\ messages \subseteq [sender -> 1..N, receiver -> 1..N, type -> {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]

Init ==
  /\ participants = 1..N
  /\ coordinator \in participants
  /\ state = [i \in participants |-> "INIT"]
  /\ messages = {}

Next ==
  \/ CoordinatorAction
  \/ ParticipantAction

CoordinatorAction ==
  /\ state[coordinator] = "INIT"
  /\ messages' = messages \union { [sender |-> coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare"] : p \in participants \ {coordinator} }
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "PREPARED"]

ParticipantAction ==
  \/ /\ state[coordinator] = "PREPARED"
      /\ \E p \in participants \ {coordinator} :
          /\ state[p] = "INIT"
          /\ messages' = messages \union { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> coordinator, type |-> "VoteYes"] }
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "COMMITTED"]
  \/ /\ state[coordinator] = "PREPARED"
      /\ \E p \in participants \ {coordinator} :
          /\ state[p] = "INIT"
          /\ messages' = messages \union { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> coordinator, type |-> "VoteNo"] }
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "ABORTED"]
  \/ /\ state[coordinator] = "COMMITTED"
      /\ \E p \in participants \ {coordinator} :
          /\ state[p] = "COMMITTED"
          /\ messages' = messages \union { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> coordinator, type |-> "Commit"] }
          /\ UNCHANGED state
  \/ /\ state[coordinator] = "ABORTED"
      /\ \E p \in participants \ {coordinator} :
          /\ state[p] = "ABORTED"
          /\ messages' = messages \union { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> coordinator, type |-> "Abort"] }
          /\ UNCHANGED state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, state, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a set of fork indices {1, 2, ..., N} *)
Forks == {1, 2, ..., N}

(* States: a function from philosopher indices to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)
States == [i \in Forks |-> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state: all forks are free, all philosophers are thinking *)
Init == forks = Forks /\ states = [i \in Forks |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper: determine the left and right fork indices for philosopher i *)
LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Helper: check if philosopher i can eat (both adjacent forks are free) *)
CanEat(i) == LeftFork(i) \in forks /\ RightFork(i) \in forks

(* Action: philosopher i picks up both forks and starts eating *)
TakeForks(i) == 
  /\ states[i] = "hungry"
  /\ CanEat(i)
  /\ forks' = forks \ {LeftFork(i), RightFork(i)}
  /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down both forks and starts thinking *)
PutForks(i) == 
  /\ states[i] = "eating"
  /\ forks' = forks \cup {LeftFork(i), RightFork(i)}
  /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
BecomeHungry(i) == 
  /\ states[i] = "thinking"
  /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
  /\ forks' = forks

(* Next action: any philosopher can become hungry, or any philosopher who can eat can start eating, or any philosopher who is eating can put down forks *)
Next == 
  \E i \in Forks :
    (BecomeHungry(i) \/ TakeForks(i) \/ PutForks(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant: forks is a subset of Forks, states is a function from Forks to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \subseteq Forks
  /\ states \in [Forks -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

(* Type definitions *)
Num == [1..N]
Flag == [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
NumSet == {1..N}

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Choosing phase: set flag[i] = TRUE *)
Choosing(i) == flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<num>>

(* Assigning number: num[i] = 1 + Max(num) *)
Assigning(i) == LET maxNum == IF Len(num) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE Max(num) IN
               /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
               /\ UNCHANGED flag

(* Done phase: set flag[i] = FALSE *)
Done(i) == flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED num

(* Next action: process i chooses, assigns, and then is done *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          (Choosing(i) /\ Assigning(i) /\ Done(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init ==
    /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

Producer(x) ==
    /\ size < K
    /\ q[tail] = x
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<q, head>>

Consumer ==
    /\ size > 0
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<q, tail>>

Next ==
    \/ \E x \in Nat : Producer(x)
    \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK ==
    /\ K \in Nat
    /\ K > 0
    /\ q \in [1..K -> Nat]
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K
